results.rendered_html:
satyā
1 Truthfulness, veracity.
2 N. of Sītā.
3 Of Draupadī.
4 Of Satyavatī, mother of Vyāsa.
5 Of Durgā.
6 Of Satyabhāmā, wife of Kṛṣṇa.
7 Of the mother of Viṣṇu; satyāyāmabhavat satyaḥ satyarūpo janārdanaḥ.
